title: austrobuxus celebicus
intro: Austrobuxus celebicus, also known as the Celebes boxwood or Celebes box, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. Native to the Philippines and Sulawesi, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Austrobuxus celebicus include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures or salves.
